announcements.title: Welcome to Our Creative World
announcements.content: Step in, explore the work, and discover bold design crafted to make your brand unforgettable.

about.title: About GadgetTech
about.subtitle: Design, fashion, and technology—built for bold brands.
about.bio: GadgetTech is a Ghana-based creative and tech brand helping individuals and businesses stand out through premium design, custom clothing, and reliable gadgets. We combine creativity, quality, and fast delivery to turn ideas into results.

sections.title: Creative Design
sections.description: From flyers and logos to banners and social media visuals, we craft attention-grabbing designs that elevate your brand.

sections.title: Custom Clothing
sections.description: Premium custom apparel for brands, teams, and events—designed for comfort, style, and lasting impressions.

sections.title: Tech Gadgets
sections.description: From laptops to accessories, we provide dependable gadgets that are sourced, tested, and delivered nationwide.
